assertions.summary: Enter Package screen matches required content and Begin Onboarding routes to handshake.
assertions.details: Validated /demo/onboard-enter-package text and controls (Onboarding Package, validator line, Package Password, Begin Onboarding). DOM check confirmed both label rows contain inline SVG help icons. Clicking Begin Onboarding transitioned to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard/handshake. Console/page errors: none observed. Network: no relevant API calls; SPA/document requests only.

assertions.summary: Handshake variant renders correctly without top BackLink.
assertions.details: On /demo/onboard-handshake, observed heading/subtitle, 4-step timeline, package status row, and Cancel Onboarding control. Button/link inventory showed only demo toolbar links plus Cancel Onboarding; no Back/Back to Welcome control present above H1. Console/page errors: none. Network: no relevant API calls.

assertions.summary: Timeout failed variant content and amber styling are present.
assertions.details: On /demo/onboard-failed, observed Onboarding Failed + Onboarding Timed Out copy with Retry and Back to Onboarding CTAs. Style inspection showed onboard-error-alert class tokens bg-[#EAB3081A] border-[#EAB30840] with computed amber background/border values. Console/page errors: none. Network: no relevant API calls.

assertions.summary: Rejected variant copy is correct but alert styling is not visually distinct red from timeout variant.
assertions.details: On /demo/onboard-failed-rejected, observed required title/body copy and both CTAs. However, style inspection of .onboard-error-alert reported class tokens including red variant but computed colors remained amber-like (same amber background/border family as timeout variant), so the required red visual distinction was not satisfied. Console/page errors: none. Network: no relevant API calls.

assertions.summary: Onboarding Complete screen content parity verified, including Profile Password help icon.
assertions.details: On /demo/onboard-complete, verified success heading/body, Group Profile and Device Profile cards, password/confirm fields with Save & Launch Signer CTA. DOM check on .import-password-title-row confirmed inline SVG help icon next to Profile Password heading. Console/page errors: none. Network: no relevant API calls.

assertions.summary: Failed-screen CTAs navigate correctly for both timeout and rejected variants.
assertions.details: From /demo/onboard-failed and /demo/onboard-failed-rejected: Retry navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard/handshake; Back to Onboarding navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard for both variants. Console/page errors: none. Network: no relevant API calls.

assertions.summary: Main-app welcome onboarding path and failed route accessibility were verified end-to-end.
assertions.details: From /, clicked Onboard action to reach /onboard. After providing package + password (Begin is disabled until required fields are populated), Begin Onboarding navigated /onboard/handshake and auto-advanced to /onboard/complete. Error path was reachable directly at /onboard/failed. URL trace observed: / -> /onboard -> /onboard/handshake -> /onboard/complete, plus /onboard/failed reachable. Console/page errors: none. Network: no API/XHR failures observed.

frictions.description: In main-app onboarding flow, Begin Onboarding is initially disabled on /onboard until package and password are entered.
frictions.resolution: Filled onboarding package and package password fields before continuing.
